message:
refactor(choreography): extract pipeline generate body into generate_with_locals helper

Simplify the public generate() method to delegate to generate_with_locals(),
reducing code duplication between the public entry point and internal
pipeline logic. The full implementation (validate, project, convert to
saga plans, CALM-batch, render modules, generate lab tests) now lives
in the helper method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
